get.description:
OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- YAML: application/vnd.oai.openapi
- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: A unique value identifying this department.

parameters.description: A unique value identifying this department.

parameters.description: A unique value identifying this department.

parameters.description: A unique value identifying this department.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all **active** faculty accounts. Requires administrator privileges.

post.description: Creates a new faculty account together with its associated `faculty_profile`. Password is auto-generated by the custom manager. Requires administrator privileges.

get.description: Returns the full profile of a single faculty member identified by their `college_id`. Requires administrator privileges.

put.description: Fully replaces all writable fields on a faculty member and their `faculty_profile`. Requires administrator privileges.

patch.description: Partially updates one or more fields on a faculty member and/or their `faculty_profile`. All fields are optional. Requires administrator privileges.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the faculty member by setting `is_active = False`. The database row is **never** removed, preserving all related data. Requires administrator privileges.

get.description:
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

The response shape depends on the caller's role:
- **student** → `StudentSerializer` (includes `student_profile`)
- **faculty** → `FacultySerializer` (includes `faculty_profile`)

Other roles (e.g. admin) `UserSerializer`.

401.description: Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all **active** student accounts. Requires administrator privileges.

post.description: Creates a new student account together with its associated `student_profile`. Password is auto-generated by the custom manager. Requires administrator privileges.

get.description: Returns the full profile of a single student identified by their `college_id`. Requires administrator privileges.

put.description: Fully replaces all writable fields on a student and their `student_profile`. Requires administrator privileges.

patch.description: Partially updates one or more fields on a student and/or their `student_profile`. All fields are optional. Requires administrator privileges.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the student by setting `is_active = False`. The database row is **never** removed, preserving all related data. Requires administrator privileges.

post.description:
Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web
token pair to prove the authentication of those credentials.

Takes a token and blacklists it. Must be used with the
`rest_framework_simplejwt.token_blacklist` app installed.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

get.description:
CRUD operations for courses.

* GET /api/v1/courses/         → list all active courses
* POST /api/v1/courses/        → create a new course
* GET /api/v1/courses/{id}/    → retrieve a single course
* PUT/PATCH /api/v1/courses/{id}/ → update a course
* DELETE /api/v1/courses/{id}/ → delete a course
